---
title: "Entropy Governs the Structure and Reactivity of Water Dissociation Under Electric Fields"
author: ["Yair Litman", "Angelos Michaelides"]
date: 2025-11-01
publication: "J. Am. Chem. Soc. **147**, 44885–44894 (2025)"
categories: ["electrochemistry", "water"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.5c12397
url_preprint:
journ: "J. Am.  Chem.  Soc."
issue: 147
page: "44885-44894"
year: 2025
image: featured.jpg
pub_number: 29
---
